name: Кира и Сергей — тренировка в зале

visual_parameters.clothing_kira: black fitted sports crop top, dark leggings
visual_parameters.clothing_sergey: grey tank top, black athletic shorts
visual_parameters.pose: Kira stretching on red mat, Sergey spotting from behind, hands near her waist (not touching), intense eye contact in mirror reflection
visual_parameters.lighting: cold overhead fluorescent + warm skin bounce from side window
visual_parameters.camera: cinematic medium shot, shallow depth of field, mirror reflection visible

qwen_prompt: Athletic 24yo dark blonde curly shoulder-length woman in black fitted sports crop top and dark leggings stretching on red gym mat, 27yo athletic man with dark blonde short hair and blue eyes in grey tank top spotting behind her, intense eye contact visible in large wall mirror, cold overhead fluorescent mixed with warm side window light, sport editorial photography, cinematic medium shot, shallow depth of field, photorealistic, 8K, film grain, subtle sweat detail on skin
negative_prompt: blurry, plastic skin, doll-like, deformed hands, extra fingers, oversaturated, watermark, childlike, anime, cartoon, touching inappropriately, explicit contact
notes: Fashion/sport editorial framing. Mirror reflection creates distance — avoids explicit proximity. No anatomical terms.
